title: Webmaster
compiled_truth: Webmaster is an external contact at [Cambridge Energy Research](companies/cera). Over the corpus period (2000-03-01 to 2002-02-07), Webmaster sent 137 and received 5 emails, totalling 142 interactions. Top correspondents: [Clients](people/clients-cera) (86), [Insights](people/insights-cera) (11), [Nsights](people/nsights-cera) (11), [Vkamins](people/vkamins) (5), [Vince J Kaminski](people/vince-j-kaminski) (3).
